---
title: "Developing consummer index"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
jupyter: python3
---

# Developing a consumer price index

```{python}
import os 
os.chdir('..')
```

```{python}
import polars as pl
import requests
```

```{python}
year = "2010"
fips = "06"
base = "https://api.usaspending.gov/"
param = f"api/v2/search/spending_by_category/{fips}/"
url = base + param
print(url)
r = requests.get(url).json()
pl.DataFrame(r)
```
